scripts.test:diagnostic: rm -rf .diagnostic-test-build && tsc --ignoreConfig --module Node16 --moduleResolution Node16 --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --outDir .diagnostic-test-build --noEmit false --rootDir . src/modules/onboarding-agent/model/diagnosticScoring.test.ts && node .diagnostic-test-build/src/modules/onboarding-agent/model/diagnosticScoring.test.js
scripts.test:learning-route: tsc --ignoreConfig --module Node16 --moduleResolution Node16 --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --types node --outDir .learning-route-test-build --noEmit false --rootDir . src/modules/onboarding-agent/model/learningRouteBuilder.test.ts && node .learning-route-test-build/src/modules/onboarding-agent/model/learningRouteBuilder.test.js
